text.title: Writing Implementation Plans Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the writing-implementation-plans methodology end-to-end.

step.name: check-design-accepted
step.action: Read frontmatter; verify `status: Accepted`. Read all AD-X + file_table.
step.decision-gate: If not Accepted, emit skip-record citing r1-design-accepted and STOP.

step.name: prereq-check
step.action: Confirm spec is also Accepted (referenced by design). Confirm repo testing convention exists.

step.name: wbs-decomposition
step.action: Map each file_table row to an atomic task. Always include explicit test + CHANGELOG tasks per AD-X.
step.output: Initial task list with id + title + files + est_tokens stub.

step.name: dependency-graph
step.action: For each task: enumerate Finish-to-Start deps. Run `find-shared-files.py` to surface implicit deps via shared-file modifications.
step.decision-gate: If implicit shared-file deps remain unmodelled, BLOCK.

step.name: wave-analysis
step.action: Topo-sort tasks; bin-pack into waves respecting deps + per-wave executor budget.
step.decision-gate: If any task est_tokens > 100k, split before assigning to a wave.

step.name: phase-definition
step.action: Group waves into phases (impl / integrate / test / rollout) with phase-level milestones.

step.name: task-format
step.action: For each task: write title + files + est_tokens (itemized) + traces_to (AD-X / FR-X).

step.name: critical-path
step.action: Compute longest path through the dep graph; mark critical path.

step.name: risk-assessment
step.action: For each high-risk task: name the risk + the mitigation. Risks aggregate to the plan-level risks array.

step.name: testing-strategy
step.action: For each AD-X: which test type (unit / integration / e2e / contract) covers it. Confirm test tasks are present in WBS.

step.name: rollout-rollback-and-emit
step.action: Author rollout strategy (feature flag, canary, staged) + rollback procedure (specific to last wave). Emit `status: Draft`; flag for owner review.
step.decision-gate: If rollback empty, BLOCK draft completion.
